Issues: The overall commercial appeal is low as presented. While the aesthetic is stylized, it lacks the unique hook or high-quality finish typically required for successful mass commercial sales.
The execution quality (line work, shading, consistency) could be improved for high-end printing or merchandise.
The image relies heavily on a specific, localized aesthetic (Chinese text/style) which limits its broad, international commercial appeal unless targeted specifically at that demographic or niche.
As an illustration, the composition is acceptable but could be enhanced to be more dynamic and visually striking.
